# Requirements (source of truth)

Verbatim copies of the hackathon brief and the Task-04 product spec. These are the
**authoritative requirements** this repo is graded against — do not edit them to match the
implementation; fix the implementation (or record the gap in
[`../../REQUIREMENTS-TRACEABILITY.md`](../../REQUIREMENTS-TRACEABILITY.md)).

| File | What it is |
|------|------------|
| [`HACKATHON-REQUIREMENTS.md`](HACKATHON-REQUIREMENTS.md) | The *Agent-Driven SDLC & Software Factory* task — phases, success criteria, final deliverables, verification checklist |
| [`Task04-requirements.md`](Task04-requirements.md) | NEURAL SYNC product requirements (mission, architecture, matching engine, NFRs, failure conditions) |
| [`Acceptance-Criteria.md`](Acceptance-Criteria.md) | NEURAL SYNC acceptance criteria |
| [`Task04-idea-brief.md`](Task04-idea-brief.md) | NEURAL SYNC idea brief + worked examples (good match / skill-only trap / LLM I/O contract / reallocation) |

Coverage of every item here is tracked in
[`../../REQUIREMENTS-TRACEABILITY.md`](../../REQUIREMENTS-TRACEABILITY.md).
